message:
fix: moved-value bug in runtime_telemetry proptest + unified telemetry additions

- Fix E0382 in proptest_stable_hash_is_deterministic_hex: clone hash
  before prop_assert_eq! moves it, allowing subsequent length check
- Include PlumGate's unified telemetry cross-subsystem normalization
  (UnifiedTelemetryRecord, source adapters, field policy, unit tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
